mission.title: argo: ApplicationSet: Add option to preserve manual parameter overrides
mission.description: ApplicationSet: Add option to preserve manual parameter overrides. Requested by 66+ users.

steps.title: Check current argo deployment
steps.description:
Verify your argo version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n argo -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo
helm list -n argo 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working argo installation.

steps.title: Review argo configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant argo configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n argo -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo
kubectl get configmap -n argo -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=argo
```
ApplicationSets automatically override manual Application parameter overrides, e.g. performed with argocd client (argocd app set command).

steps.title: Apply the fix for ApplicationSet: Add option to preserve manual parameter
steps.description:
ref: https://github.com/argoproj/argo-cd/issues/9101#issuecomment-1295192668

Add a `create-delete` policy to create or delete in ApplicationSet.

> My team is having trouble because we are using the Pull Request Generator + Image Updater.
> 
> The `create-only` policy alleviates this problem.

```yaml
в”‚В В  в”‚В В  в”њв”Ђв”Ђ example-component-3.yaml

    в”њв”Ђв”Ђ dev

    в””в”Ђв”Ђ stg
        в”њв”Ђв”Ђ appli
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n argo -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo
kubectl get events -n argo --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "ApplicationSet: Add option to preserve manual parameter" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
ref: https://github.com/argoproj/argo-cd/issues/9101#issuecomment-1295192668

Add a `create-delete` policy to create or delete in ApplicationSet.

> My team is having trouble because we are using the Pull Request Generator + Image Updater.
> 
> The `create-only` policy alleviates this problem. However, it is difficult to use because it is not deleted when the pull request is closed.
codeSnippets:
вќЇ tree
.
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ application.yaml
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ base
в”‚В В  в”њв”Ђв”Ђ applications
в”‚В В  в”‚В В  в”њв”Ђв”Ђ example-component.yaml
в”‚В В  в”‚В В  в”њв”Ђв”Ђ example-component-2.yaml
в”‚В В  в”‚В В  в”њв”Ђв”Ђ example-component-3.yaml
в”‚В В  в”‚В В  в”њв”Ђв”Ђ example-component-4.yaml
в”‚В В  в”‚В В  в””в”Ђв”Ђ example-component-5.yaml
в”‚В В  в””в”Ђв”Ђ kustomization.yaml
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ kustomization.yaml
в””в”Ђв”Ђ overlays
    в”њв”Ђв”Ђ dev
    в”‚В В  в”њв”Ђв”Ђ appproject.yaml
    в”‚В В  в””в”Ђв”Ђ kustomization.yaml
    в”њв”Ђв”Ђ pro
    в”‚В В  в”њв”Ђв”Ђ applications
    в”‚В В  в”‚В В  в”њв”Ђв”Ђ pro-only-example-component.yaml
    в”‚В В  в”‚В В  в””в”Ђв”Ђ pro-only-example-component-1.yaml
    в”‚В В  в”њв”Ђв”Ђ appproject.yaml
    в”‚В В  в””в”Ђв”Ђ kustomization.yaml
    в””в”Ђв”Ђ stg
        в”њв”Ђв”Ђ applications
        в”‚В В  в””в”Ђв”Ђ stg-only-example-component.yaml
        в”њв”Ђв”Ђ appproject.yaml
        в””в”Ђв”Ђ kustomization.yaml

bases:
  - ../../base

resources:
  - appproject.yaml
  - applications/pro-only-example-component.yaml
  - applications/pro-only-example-component-1.yaml

transformers:
  - |-
    apiVersion: builtin
    kind: PrefixSuffixTransformer
    metadata:
      name: prefix
    prefix: workload-pro-
    fieldSpecs:
      - kind: Application
        path: metadata/name
  - |-
    apiVersion: builtin
    kind: PrefixSuffixTransformer
    metadata:
      name: source-path-prefix
    prefix: manifests/workload/pro
    fieldSpecs:
      - kind: Application
        path: spec/source/path
patches:
  - patch: |-
      - op: replace
        path: /spec/project
        value: workload-pro
      - op: replace
        path: /spec/destination
        value:
          server: https://api.pro-cluster-fqdn:6443

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with argo installed or the issue environment reproducible.
